productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Cuffed Beanie Blue Skull Cap
description: Crafted from soft knit fabric and in a stylish cuffed style, this beanie from nike makes for a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Designed to offer snug comfort, this beanie is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks. Made of 100% knit acrylic fabric Cuffed hem in a contrast colour, which can be opened up to cover the ears completely Embroidered nike swoosh on the front cuff Care Hand wash in warm water and line dry Do not dry clean, bleach, wring or iron
